title: T-007 — SO Server Actions: create_draft_so, insert_so_line, confirm_so, cancel_so, place_hold, release_hold, allergen_override (11-shipping-b)
prompt:
# T-007 — Sales Order Server Actions + status machine guards

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §6 D-SHP-8 SO Status Machine + Guards, §8.1 SO Lifecycle, §10 Quality Hold Integration, §11 V-SHIP-SO-01..08, §3 Personas
Prototype refs: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:115-271 (so_create_wizard_modal), :273-290 (so_line_add_modal), :342-378 (hold_place_modal), :380-410 (hold_release_modal), :504-536 (so_cancel_modal), :837-871 (allergen_override_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Write Next.js Server Actions covering SO lifecycle (draft→confirmed→…→cancelled) wrapped in `withOrgContext` (T-125), with status-machine guards per D-SHP-8, RBAC via T-031 permissions, transactional Drizzle + outbox + audit + rate-limit + PII redact.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/sales-orders.ts` exports:
   - `createDraftSO(input)` — INSERT sales_orders + sales_order_lines in tx; allergen_validated=false; status='draft'; outbox `shipping.so.created`. Permission `ship.so.create`.
   - `insertSOLine(soId, input)` — guard `status='draft'`; INSERT line; recompute total_amount_gbp. Permission `ship.so.create`.
   - `confirmSO(soId, input)` — guards (D-SHP-8): status='draft', ≥1 line (V-SHIP-SO-05), shipping_address_id NOT NULL (V-SHIP-SO-02), allergen_validated=true OR allergen_override exists (V-SHIP-SO-03), promised_ship_date>=order_date (V-SHIP-SO-04); UPDATE status='confirmed', confirmed_at, confirmed_by; outbox `shipping.so.confirmed`. Permission `ship.so.confirm`.
   - `cancelSO(soId, reason)` — guard status NOT IN ('shipped','delivered') (V-SHIP-SO-07); UPDATE status='cancelled'; releases any allocations (calls T-012 releaseAllocation); outbox `shipping.so.cancelled`. Permission `ship.so.cancel`.
   - `placeHold(soId, holdType, reason)` — soft hold record; emits `shipping.hold.placed`. Permission `ship.hold.place`.
   - `releaseHold(holdId, reason)` — emits `shipping.hold.released`. Permission `ship.hold.release`.
   - `overrideAllergenConflict(soId, conflicts, reason)` — INSERT allergen_overrides (audit_hash SHA-256, approver_pin_hash via @monopilot/e-sign T-124 dual-sign optional Phase 1); sets sales_orders.allergen_validated=true; outbox `shipping.allergen.overridden`. Permission `ship.allergen.override` (shipping_qa).
2. Status machine guards centralized in `apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/_so-status-machine.ts` returning `{ ok: true } | { ok: false, blocker_code: string, detail: string }` for testability.
3. Server-side allergen cascade check uses `check_allergen_conflicts(so_id)` function (Postgres) consuming `customer_allergen_restrictions` + product.allergens (NPD shared BOM SSOT) — per D-SHP-15 + V-SHIP-LBL-01. If conflicts → block confirm unless `allergen_overrides` exists.
4. Quality hold pre-flight: `confirmSO` queries `v_active_holds` (09-quality) for any LP referenced by reservations (T-011) and if any hold.severity='critical' → block with `blocker_code='qa.critical_hold'`.
5. All mutations wrapped in `withOrgContext` (T-125). Outbox via @monopilot/outbox (T-112). Rate-limit (T-121). Pino redact (T-117). No GUC reads.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/sales-orders.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/_so-status-machine.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/__tests__/sales-orders.test.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify — ShippingSOCreated, ShippingSOConfirmed, ShippingSOCancelled, ShippingHoldPlaced/Released, ShippingAllergenOverridden Zod schemas]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a draft SO with no shipping_address_id, when confirmSO is called, then it returns blocker_code='ship.so.address_missing' (V-SHIP-SO-02) and no status change occurs.
2. Given a draft SO with allergen conflicts and no override, when confirmSO is called, then it returns blocker_code='ship.so.allergen_conflict' (V-SHIP-SO-03) and no status change.
3. Given a draft SO whose allocated LP has an active critical quality_hold, when confirmSO is called, then it returns blocker_code='qa.critical_hold' (D-SHP-13 hard gate); no status change.
4. Given a confirmed SO, when cancelSO is called and any allocations exist, then the allocations are released atomically (calls T-012 releaseAllocation in same tx) and status='cancelled'; outbox event shipping.so.cancelled emitted.
5. Given grep `current_setting\('app\.(tenant_id|current_org_id)'\)` is run on sales-orders.ts and _so-status-machine.ts, when results inspected, then zero matches (org context via withOrgContext only).
6. Given the status machine module is imported in tests, when transitions are exercised (draft→confirmed, draft→cancelled, confirmed→cancelled, shipped→cancelled blocked), then guards return the correct ok/blocker_code per D-SHP-8.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest in `__tests__/sales-orders.test.ts` with testcontainers Postgres asserting AC 1-6, plus state-machine unit tests for all 12 status transitions.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run sales-orders.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not call any mutation outside `withOrgContext` (T-125).
- Do not bypass status-machine guards (every mutation routes through _so-status-machine.ts).
- Do not query quality_holds directly — consume `v_active_holds` view (09-quality T-010).
- Do not write PII to logs (T-117 redact).
- Do not enqueue outbox events outside the same DB transaction as the state change (R14).
- Do not approve allergen override without `ship.allergen.override` permission + e-sign hook.

pipeline_inputs.description: SO Server Actions covering full status machine (create/insertLine/confirm/cancel/hold/release/allergen-override) with QA gate + V-SHIP-SO-* guards.
pipeline_inputs.details: Status machine module is the single source of guard truth. Quality hold pre-flight via v_active_holds (D-SHP-13 hard gate for critical, soft warn otherwise). check_allergen_conflicts(so_id) Postgres function consumes customer_allergen_restrictions + product.allergens (NPD shared BOM SSOT). All mutations under withOrgContext, with outbox + audit + rate-limit + PII redact.
cross_module_dependencies: 09-quality/T-064 (consume gate — holdsGuard must be called before any LP mutation; shipping hold consumers per 2026-05-14 audit)
acceptance_criteria: Given a draft SO with no shipping_address_id, when confirmSO is called, then it returns blocker_code='ship.so.address_missing' (V-SHIP-SO-02); AND given allergen conflicts with no override, then blocker_code='ship.so.allergen_conflict' (V-SHIP-SO-03); AND given an allocated LP has an active critical quality_hold (v_active_holds via 09-quality T-064), then blocker_code='qa.critical_hold' (D-SHP-13 hard gate) — holdsGuard called before any LP mutation.
Given a confirmed SO, when cancelSO is called with allocations, then allocations are released atomically and status='cancelled'; outbox shipping.so.cancelled emitted.
Given grep on sales-orders.ts + _so-status-machine.ts for current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id'), when run, then zero matches.
Given state-machine unit tests, when exercised, then all 12 D-SHP-8 transitions return correct ok/blocker_code; AND releaseHold + placeHold emit correct outbox events with permission gates enforced.
test_strategy: RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres asserting AC 1-6; state-machine unit tests.
Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run sales-orders.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.
risk_red_lines: Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
Do not query quality_holds directly — consume v_active_holds (09-quality T-010).
Do not enqueue outbox outside the DB transaction.
Do not approve allergen override without ship.allergen.override + e-sign hook.
Do not bypass the 09-quality consume gate (T-064 v_active_holds) — every consume path must call holdsGuard(lpId, lotId) before mutating consumption tables.
